creator: jharris@widomaker.com
text:
pad 1.0.4 uses tempnam() unsecurely.  The patch I submitted
	as a followup to PR 27323 should fix this and allow the re-upgrade
	to pad 1.0.4 from 0.7, which adds additional features:

	http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=27323&f=raw

Fix: 

Unpack shar and apply followup patch in PR 27323; adjust
	PORTREVISION and PORTEPOCH as necessary.
How-To-Repeat: 	
	N/A
